languages.text: "Прошу зафиксировать благодарность за сохранение священного кортикального импланта от установки малоэффективной жизнеформе. Да благословит Омниссия ваше благоразумие".

traits.locale_text: "Прошу зафиксировать благодарность за сохранение ресурсов аугментики. Ваше вмешательство помогло умножить потенциальную эффективность отдела на одну десятую процента. Да благославит Омниссия ваше терпение".

languages.text: "Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred cortical implant from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."
languages.original_text: "Прошу зафиксировать благодарность за сохранение священного кортикального импланта от установки малоэффективной жизнеформе. Да благословит Омниссия ваше благоразумие".

traits.locale_text: "Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred cortical implant from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."
"Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred mechanism Zeta-130 from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."
"Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred mechanism Zeta-130 from being installed in an unsuitable carrier. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."
"Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred cortical implant from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."
"Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred mechanism Zeta-130 from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."

languages.text: 「聖なる機構ゼータ130を不適切な運搬手段に設置しないことに対する感謝を、ここに記します。全知の神があなたの慎重さを祝福しますように」
languages.original_text: "Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred mechanism Zeta-130 from being installed in an unsuitable carrier. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる機構ゼータ130を不適切な運搬手段に設置しないことに対する感謝を、ここに記します。全知の神があなたの慎重さを祝福しますように。」

languages.text: "Kutsal zihinsel implantı düşük verimlilikli bir yaşam formuna takılmasını engellediğiniz için lütfen minnettarlığımı kaydedin. Hermesih sağduyunuzu kutsasın."
languages.original_text: "Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred cortical implant from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal zihinsel implantı düşük verimlilikli bir yaşam formuna takılmasını engellediğiniz için lütfen minnettarlığımı kaydedin. Hermesih sağduyunuzu kutsasın."

languages.text: «Registre mi gratitud por evitar que el sagrado implante cortical se instale en una forma de vida de baja eficacia. Que el Omnissiah bendiga su prudencia».
languages.original_text: "Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred cortical implant from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."

traits.locale_text: «Registre mi gratitud por evitar que el sagrado implante cortical se instale en una forma de vida de baja eficacia. Que el Omnissiah bendiga su prudencia».

languages.text: “请登记我的感激之情，感谢您未将神圣皮层植入物装入低效率生命体。愿欧姆尼赛亚祝福您的审慎。”
languages.original_text: "Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred cortical implant from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."

traits.locale_text: “请登记我的感激之情，感谢您未将神圣皮层植入物装入低效率生命体。愿欧姆尼赛亚祝福您的审慎。”

languages.text: « Cette unité vous exprime sa reconnaissance pour avoir empêché l'implant cortical d'être installé sur une entité à efficacité inadéquate. Puisse l'Omnimessie bénir votre prudence. »
languages.original_text: "Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred cortical implant from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."

traits.locale_text: « Cette unité vous exprime sa reconnaissance pour avoir empêché l'implant cortical d'être installé sur une entité à efficacité inadéquate. Puisse l'Omnimessie bénir votre prudence. »

languages.text: "Bitte nehmt meinen Dank dafür entgegen, dass ihr dem heiligen Kortikalimplantat die Installation in eine ineffiziente Lebensform erspart habt. Möge der Omnissiah Eure Besonnenheit segnen."
languages.original_text: "Please register my gratitude for sparing the sacred cortical implant from being installed in a low-efficiency life form. May the Omnissiah bless your prudence."

traits.locale_text: "Bitte nehmt meinen Dank dafür entgegen, dass ihr dem heiligen Kortikalimplantat die Installation in eine ineffiziente Lebensform erspart habt. Möge der Omnissiah Eure Besonnenheit segnen."
